fixes: DangerChain cooldown: 60-tick cooldown to prevent cliff thrashing

i18n: +12 translation keys for save/load/list/delete/help

GatherResource: skip navigation when already at stand position

ToolSet: water penalty + not-on-ground 5x penalty
BlockIterator: shared 3D scanner for multiple consumers
DangerZone: cliff/lava/water detection + safe direction finder
AutoReplenish: auto-refill held items from inventory
AutoReplaceTool: auto-swap nearly-broken tools
AutoFish: timed-cycle auto fishing
MaterialTree: recursive recipe decomposition tree
BotStatusScreen: right-click GUI for bot inventory
ModConfig: maxBots, scanRadius, skinUrl, auto-tools, hunger, speed
ChainManager: lazy-sort + same-tick reactivation guard
DefenseChain: inventory restore + correct sword damage + full-inv bow search
